name: SDS-PAGE Gel (10% Resolving + 4% Stacking)
nameCn: SDS-PAGE 凝胶（10% 分离胶 + 4% 浓缩胶）

notes.en: Use 30% Acrylamide/Bis (29:1) stock. Add APS and TEMED last — gel polymerizes quickly once added. Overlay with isopropanol or water-saturated butanol while resolving gel sets. Pour stacking gel after resolving is solid. Acrylamide is a neurotoxin — wear gloves.
notes.zh: 此为 10% 分离胶配方（10 mL / 2 块胶）。可在 Calculator → SDS-PAGE 中调整浓度和体积。浓缩胶另配。

storage.notes: Wrap in wet paper towel + plastic bag

usage.en: Pre-cast or hand-cast SDS-PAGE gel recipe for protein size separation.
usage.zh: SDS-PAGE 凝胶配方，用于蛋白质按分子量大小分离。

prepSteps.step: Combine ddH₂O, acrylamide/bis solution, and Tris buffer in a flask.
prepSteps.warning: Acrylamide is a neurotoxin — wear gloves, avoid inhalation.

prepSteps.step: Add 10% APS and TEMED last (initiates polymerization).
Pour gel immediately between glass plates.
Overlay with isopropanol; let polymerize 30–45 min.
Pour stacking gel on top after resolving gel sets.
